## Type

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor / chore / ci / build

## Checklist

- [ ] `make` compiles cleanly
- [ ] Touched C files formatted with `clang-format`
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] If `code/` is modified: noted any impact on upstream (ec-/Quake3e) cherry-picks
- [ ] Docs / `CHANGELOG.md` updated if relevant
